title: Add Hookly to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Hookly](https://hookly-alpha.vercel.app) to writing
- Generate AI content ideas with hooks, angles, and ready-to-post drafts for 7 platforms in Hookly. Uses the Pollinations text API (DeepSeek via gen.pollinations.ai).

Fixes #12265

gist.headline: Fishing for content
gist.blurb: Hookly just landed in the Greenhouse! It's a fresh community app that spins up AI content ideas, hooks, and ready-to-post drafts for seven different platforms using our DeepSeek text API.
gist.summary: Added Hookly to the community apps directory, a new tool that generates AI content ideas, hooks, and drafts for 7 platforms using the Pollinations DeepSeek text API.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover Hookly in the Greenhouse to streamline their social media drafting process.
gist.visual_concept: The Pollinations bee mascot wearing a tiny fishing hat, catching a glowing lightbulb (idea) on a fishing line, representing 'hooks' and 'ideas'. The Nomnom creature eating social media drafts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny fishing hat, using a fishing rod to catch a glowing lightbulb from a digital pond. The round tan Nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a stack of paper drafts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny fishing hat, using a fishing rod to catch a glowing lightbulb from a digital pond. The round tan Nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a stack of paper drafts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background.
